svg.aria-label: AWS Cloud Security Complete Guide IAM to EKS Security Architecture
svg.title: AWS Security: IAM · VPC · S3 · EKS Defense in Depth Guide

g.text: VPC flow logs - NACLs - security group best practices
IAM Access Analyzer - unused roles cleanup
EKS Pod Identity - IRSA - OPA Gatekeeper policy
RDS encryption - Secrets Manager - rotation policy
S3 block public access - bucket policy audit
KMS CMK - envelope encryption - key rotation
